start.speaker: Narrator
start.text: Morning in Sherward's memory was not quiet. It began with steel in his voice and frost in the air.

father_call.speaker: Sebastian
father_call.text: You leave this house as my son, not as a runaway chasing legends.

sherward_reply.speaker: Sherward
sherward_reply.text: Then hear me now. I will not spend my life hiding while Krimora takes more from us.

father_warning.speaker: Sebastian
father_warning.text: Pride is quick to speak and slow to bury the dead. The road will test more than your blade.

sherward_vow.speaker: Sherward
sherward_vow.text: Let it test me. I leave at dawn, and I return only when this fear no longer rules us.

memory_fade.speaker: Narrator
memory_fade.text: The memory breaks. The world returns. Sherward takes his first step into the day.
